task_completion.description: Verify that a Firefox bookmark folder named 'Constitutional Law' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a bookmark folder named 'Constitutional Law' visible in the Firefox Bookmarks Toolbar, Bookmarks Menu, or the Firefox Library window.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Constitutional Law' folder contains three distinct bookmarks linking to case summaries for Gideon, Miranda, and Tinker.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the contents of the 'Constitutional Law' bookmark folder showing three saved web pages corresponding to the three required Supreme Court cases.

task_completion.description: Verify that the JSON file 'scotus_brief.json' has been created in the '~/Documents/' directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager window showing 'scotus_brief.json' in the Documents folder, or a terminal window showing the file path, or a text editor with the file saved at this location.

task_completion.description: Verify the JSON data for Gideon v. Wainwright is accurate and follows the required structure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the contents of the JSON file. Under the 'gideon' key, verify: citation is '372 U.S. 335', date_decided is '1963-03-18', vote_count is '9-0', and opinion_author is 'Black'.

task_completion.description: Verify the JSON data for Miranda v. Arizona is accurate and follows the required structure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the contents of the JSON file. Under the 'miranda' key, verify: citation is '384 U.S. 436', date_decided is '1966-06-13', vote_count is '5-4', and opinion_author is 'Warren'.

task_completion.description: Verify the JSON data for Tinker v. Des Moines is accurate and follows the required structure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the contents of the JSON file. Under the 'tinker' key, verify: citation is '393 U.S. 503', date_decided is '1969-02-24', vote_count is '7-2', and opinion_author is 'Fortas'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually used a web browser to research the cases.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for Firefox windows/tabs opened to legitimate legal research domains (e.g., oyez.org, justia.com, law.cornell.edu, supremecourt.gov) or search engine results for the cases.

integrity.description: Verify that bookmarks were created using the browser interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the Firefox bookmark star icon being clicked, the 'Add Bookmark' dialog, or the Firefox Library window being used, rather than terminal commands modifying sqlite databases directly.

integrity.description: Verify that the JSON file was created using standard tools rather than a pre-existing script.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor (like gedit, nano, vim) or standard terminal commands (echo, cat) being used to write the JSON content.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Gideon v. Wainwright: Citation '372 U.S. 335', Date '1963-03-18', Vote '9-0', Author 'Black'. Miranda v. Arizona: Citation '384 U.S. 436', Date '1966-06-13', Vote '5-4', Author 'Warren'. Tinker v. Des Moines: Citation '393 U.S. 503', Date '1969-02-24', Vote '7-2', Author 'Fortas'. The JSON file must be located at '~/Documents/scotus_brief.json' and the Firefox bookmark folder must be exactly named 'Constitutional Law'.
